Uses of Class
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.ParameterFittingStudy

Packages that use ParameterFittingStudy
Package
Description
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting
 

  • Uses of ParameterFittingStudy in neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting

    Methods in neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting that return ParameterFittingStudy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setInitialGuess(double[] initialGuess)
    Sets the initial parameter guess on the fitting function.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setMaxNumberOfIterations(int maxNumberOfIterations)
    Sets the maximum number of optimizer iterations.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setMaxRobustIterations(int maxRobustIterations)
    Sets the maximum number of robust reweighting passes.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setMultiStartCount(int multiStartCount)
    Sets the number of deterministic multi-start candidates.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setObjectiveFunctionType(ObjectiveFunctionType objectiveFunctionType)
    Sets the objective function used by the high-level study.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setParameterBounds(double[][] bounds)
    Sets lower and upper bounds for fitted parameters.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setParameterNames(String[] parameterNames)
    Sets names for the fitted parameters.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setParameterUpdateAdapter(ParameterUpdateAdapter parameterUpdateAdapter)
    Sets a model update adapter invoked whenever physical parameter values change.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setRandomSeed(long randomSeed)
    Sets the random seed used for deterministic multi-start sampling.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setRobustTuningConstant(double robustTuningConstant)
    Sets the robust objective tuning constant.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setSpec(ParameterFittingSpec spec)
    Sets a complete fitting specification.
    ParameterFittingStudy
    ParameterFittingStudy.setValidationDataSet(ExperimentalDataSet validationDataSet)
    Sets an explicit validation data set evaluated after fitting.
    Constructors in neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting with parameters of type ParameterFittingStudy
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ParameterFittingReport(ParameterFittingStudy study)
    Creates a fitting report from a completed study.
